errors_addressed.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors_addressed.resolution: Workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml verified to exist with proper configuration for workflow_dispatch trigger and Maven build steps.

errors_addressed.title: GitHub Token Permission Insufficient
errors_addressed.resolution: Token permission issues cannot be resolved through code changes. Manual verification of GitHub token 'workflow' scope required.

changes_made: Verified workflow file exists with correct configuration
Verified code structure is complete and syntactically correct
Confirmed JaCoCo plugin version 0.8.11 with prepare-agent and report goals
No code compilation errors found - all errors were configuration-related
next_steps: Verify GitHub token has 'workflow' scope enabled
Test workflow dispatch via GitHub Actions UI or API
If token permissions are correct, retry build dispatch
notes: All code files are syntactically correct and properly configured. The errors in attempt 3 were configuration issues (missing workflow file and token permissions), not code compilation errors. Workflow file now exists. Token permissions require manual verification.
